summary: A celebrated performance with a standout post‑pigpen Lovelight and an award‑show Touch of Grey, captured in an unspecified but decent recording.
review: Reviewers rave about the historic jam, highlighting one of the best post‑Pig Pen versions of "Lovelight" and a quirky big‑band rendition of "Touch of Grey" following Jerry Garcia's Grammy‑style acceptance speeches. No specific comments on sound quality were made, suggesting the audio is at least listenable, while the musical moments are deemed memorable.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are strongly positive, praising key songs and unique moments; recording quality is not critiqued, implying it is adequate, leading to a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity or mix, indicating no major issues were noticed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is noted for its historic jam and special award‑show interlude, with a memorable post‑Pig Pen Lovelight and a fun big‑band Touch of Grey after Jerry's speeches.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His two acceptance speeches are described as humble yet eloquent, adding poignancy to the show.
